title: SoFi Student Loans and Personal Lending Growth 2024-2025
text: SoFi offers personal loans and student loans with competitive interest rates, quick online pre-approval, no fees required, and flexible repayment options. SoFi offers fixed rates starting at around 3.23% APR to 15.99% APR, and variable rates starting at around 4.64% APR to 15.99% APR with a 0.25% autopay discount. SoFi offers both fixed and variable rate student loans with terms ranging from five to 20 years. In April 2025, SoFi announced SmartStart, a new repayment option for its 7-, 10-, 15- and 20-year refinance loans where for the first nine months after refinancing, borrowers can pay a smaller amount that covers only the loan's interest. As of December 2024, SoFi has helped over 534,374 members refinance more than $45.8 billion in student loans, with student loan originations reaching $1.3 billion in the fourth quarter, a 71% year-over-year increase. Personal loans from SoFi can be used to consolidate debt and pay for life expenses with same day online personal loans. By January, SoFi claimed nearly 6% market share in the U.S. personal loans business. By December 2023, the company reportedly had a 0.1% share in the home loan market in the U.S. The number of SoFi members (customers) was nearly 9.4 million as of October 2024.
